Alpha units

Models for reactions in the alpha factor pathway are provided mostly in separate units to allow easy and rapid modification of any of them. The commands provided by these units frequently just set the reaction parameters.

  • gpa unit - Adds commands so that the user can define G-proteins, which bind GDP and GTP and have allosteric properties depedent on which of the two is bound.

  • gpa exchange unit - Defines an "exchange" reaction that changes the GTP-bound form of the G-protein Gpa1 to the GDP-bound form and a "revert" reaction that changes it back.

  • twenty-eleven unit - Defines reaction by which Ste20 phosphorylates Ste11 in the context of a particular complex.

  • eleven-seven unit - Defines reaction by which Ste11 phosphorylates Ste7 in the scaffolding complex.

  • seven-three unit - Defines reaction by which Ste7 phosphorylates Fus3 in the scaffolding complex.

  • three-seven unit - Defines reaction by which Fus3 phosphorylates Ste7 in the scaffolding complex.
